【Day 13】I Thought I Was in The Matrix: Opening CMD for the First Time
Code Review of My Youth - From the BIOS Beep to Software Engineering

A network-troubleshooting story from my first time opening CMD — basic uses of ping, ipconfig, tracert, netstat with macOS equivalents, plus terminal easter eggs and Homebrew (sl, cowsay, fortune, cmatrix). A Lag incident that strings together the practicality and fun of the command line.
